title: Parent Issue Workflow Cache
description: Constant prompt cache for all child issues under one parent/PRD issue. Holds epic scope only — not per-child harnessUtility or phase blocks.

parentIssueId.description: Parent/PRD GitHub issue (e.g. #278). The only constant across child issues.

parentScopeBlock.description: Epic-level scope: phase deferrals, north star, data-source policy, shared handoff decisions.

sliceId.description: EXECUTION.md slice metadata (informational; not a cache key).

handoffPath.description: Active handoff doc for this parent epic (e.g. docs/handoffs/phase-2-tiktok-implementation.md).

childIssueIds.description: Child issues that have run under this parent cache.

doNotLoad.description: Epic-wide exclusions. Child issues may add more in their own issue context cache.

upstreamFingerprints.description: Fingerprints for parent issue body and epic handoff — not child issue bodies.

branch.description: Branch name bootstrap sources were copied from (informational; pin is commitSha).

commitSha.description: Immutable git commit SHA for skills, schemas, templates, and config copied into sibling runs.

copiedAt.description: When bootstrapRef was last set or verified.

architectNote.description: Required when bumping commitSha after branch HEAD advanced.

bootstrapRef.description: Pins harness bootstrap source so sibling runs do not drift on a floating branch head.
